calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross for Miranda Bergman.

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position with regard to venue. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Leters Testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)
